positive: Minimalist, geometric illustration of a group of various stylized woodland animals (deer, fox, owl, bear) interacting in a stylized, cyclical composition. The style should be clean, elegant linework combined with flat, segmented color blocking, reminiscent of mid-century Scandinavian design or modern folk art. Use a limited, earthy color palette: sage green, burnt ochre, deep navy blue, and cream white. The composition must be balanced and suitable for a central repeat pattern or large apparel print. Strong contrast against a pure white background. The animals should have clean silhouettes and simple, graphic forms, emphasizing shape over photorealism. Highly detailed linework, vector art quality, symmetrical composition, centered.
negative: photography, photorealistic, 3d, CGI, blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, cropped, messy, complex background, low detail
